name: Top K Frequent Elements
statement:
Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return any order list of the k most frequent elements in nums.


Your solution must run in better than O(n log n) time, where n = nums.length.
constraints:
• 1 ≤ nums.length ≤ 105
  • -104 ≤ nums[i] ≤ 104
  • 1 ≤ k ≤ number of distinct elements in nums
  • The answer is guaranteed to be unique.

examples.explanation: 1 appears 3 times, 2 appears 2 times, 3 appears once. The two most-frequent elements are 1 and 2.
4 and 6 both occur twice (highest), 7 occurs once.
